THRESHOLD: the shut planetarium in the old park
ENTRANCE: the propped fire door behind the hedge
OPENING_MOMENT: a clear night with the dome unlocked
DEADLINE: the guard's rounds coming back this way
DEADLINE_SIGN: distant footsteps echoing in the halls
COMMUNITY_MOTTO: many eyes make the sky wide
ROUTE_BW: the stairs down to the boiler room
ROUTE_OL: the stairs up to the projection loft
TB_SMELL: dust, machine oil, and stale popcorn
TB_OLD_HINT: my charts stay with the dome
HM_SECRET_NOTE: the dome keeps her own secrets
WS_CHISEL: a tiny brass screwdriver sized for a hand
CV_CHIMES: wind chimes made of old brass gears
OL_ROLL_LABEL: for the wheel that keeps my charts
OL_CREST_FIND: wiring, dust, and a nesting pigeon
OL_TRACING: a tracing of the star-wheel gear seam
BW_UNDER: a maze of dusty boiler pipes
